items.rendered:
error[E0605]: non-primitive cast: `HANDLE` as `usize`
  --> src\main.rs:80:40
   |
80 |             let chunk_index = unsafe { (*overlapped_ptr).hEvent as usize };
   |                                        ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ an `as` expression can only be used to convert between primitive types or to coerce to a specific trait object

error[E0308]: mismatched types
   --> src\main.rs:127:25
    |
127 |     overlapped.hEvent = chunk_index as *mut _;
    |     -----------------   ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ expected `HANDLE`, found `*mut _`
    |     |
    |     expected due to the type of this binding
    |
    = note:   expected struct `HANDLE`
            found raw pointer `*mut _`
help: try wrapping the expression in `windows::Win32::Foundation::HANDLE`
    |
127 |     overlapped.hEvent = windows::Win32::Foundation::HANDLE(chunk_index as *mut _);
    |                         +++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++                     +
